title: GPSR forward: coord validation should reject (0,0)
description:
File: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py
Line: 508-512

The gpsr_forward function validates lat/lon ranges and rejects NaN/inf, but does not reject the null island coordinates (0.0, 0.0). Coordinates at (0, 0) are almost always invalid GPS data and should be rejected as a sentinel value. This could lead to routing failures toward the Gulf of Guinea.
close_reason: Fixed: added rejection of null island (0,0) coordinates in gpsr_forward
